titleStmt.title: SII 37.474: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 474. (A.R. No. B 43 of 1942-43.) Śrīśailaṁ, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: slab set up on the paved way leading from the souther gōpura of the Mallikārjuna to the Cheñchu colony.
This is dated Śaka 1327, Pārtiva, Chaitra ba. 10, Wednesday, corresponding to 1405 A.D., March 26. However the week day is Thursday and not Wednesday.

It states that Kāṭmareḍḍi Vēmireḍḍi constructed the stone steps leading to Srikanṭhēśvara for the spiritual merit of Komaragirireḍḍi and his queen Ammaṅ-gāru. Komaragirireḍḍi bears the epithets, Jaganoppagaṇḍa and Gajapati-vibhāḷa among others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyu
da śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1327 A
gunēṁṭi pā¨rttika
savatsara chaitra ba 10
bu jaganoppagaṁḍa
kēḷādirāya manya
kula parusyarāma
rāya veṁsyabuja
ṁga gajapati vibhāḷa
rāya gōvāḷa kōma
ragiri reḍḍiṁgārikinni A
mmaṁgāllekunnu pu
ṇyamugānu kāṭama
reḍi vēmireḍiṁgāru
sīkaṁṭhēsvaraṁ sōpāna
lu sēyiṁciri maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.474 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
